items.title: Budget tax proposal lifts spirit to long-pending feni project in Kannur
items.summary: The ‘Kannur Feni’ project of Payyavoor Service Cooperative Bank is awaiting final approval from the Excise Minister after nearly a decade of regulatory and administrative processes

items.title: US Supreme Court upholds bans on transgender women in female school and college sports
items.summary: It rules that states can ban transgender athletes from competing in women's and girls' sports.

items.title: Putin Faces Increased Pressure as Moscow Is Again Attacked by Drones
items.summary: The Russian authorities said 419 drones were shot down across Russia, including in the capital, and in Crimea.
